      • time

        public static long time(double timeInSeconds)
        This method transforms the time for use in "Thread.sleep()" according to the speed factor. CAUTION! Time input in seconds only!
        Parameters:
        timeInSeconds - time in seconds
        Returns:
        transformed time in milliseconds
